headline: Musk's 'Money Doesn't Have Power' Video Goes Viral: Here's What He Says About It

headline: Elon Musk Responds To Reports That Software Issues Led To Volkswagen CEO Herbert Diess' Departure
summary: Reports of Volkswagen AG (OTC: VWAGY) CEO Herbert Diess'  exit from the company trickled in on Friday. A report by Automobilwoche suggested that the move was precipitated by disgruntlement among the Porsche and Piech families, which control the majority of voting shares at Volkswagen.
